name: Assault
effect: Increase the production of Infernal Realms based on Hellfire Blast casts this Era.
formula: (160 + 80 * x^0.8)%, where x = Hellfire Blast casts this Era

name: Dueling
effect: Increase production of all other buildings by 130% per Elven Training Ground built.
formula: ×130% per Training Ground built

name: War Funds
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Tax Collection casts this Era.
formula: (10 * x^0.4)%, where x = Tax Collection casts this Era

name: Exertion
requirement: 1 hour as Evil (This R) — unlock as Demon
effect: Increase FC find chance based on Undercities built.
formula: +(2 * x^1.2), where x = Undercities built

name: Betrayal
effect: Increase production of Non-Unique buildings based on assistants owned.
formula: (9 * x^0.9)%, where x = assistants owned

name: Rampage
effect: Increase Maximum Mana based on trophies unlocked.
formula: floor(1.3 * x^1.1), where x = trophies unlocked

name: Invasion
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on assistants owned.
formula: (15 * x^0.5)%, where x = assistants owned

name: Overwhelm
effect: Gain assistants based on Evil spells cast this Reincarnation.
formula: +(9 + 0.9 * x^0.9), where x = Evil spells cast this Reincarnation

name: Formation
requirement: 150 Call to Arms (This R), Research Dueling (W10) & Exertion (W50)
effect: Each building counts 15 times for Call to Arms purposes.

name: Crusade
effect: Multiplicatively increase Royal Exchange bonus based on Research Points.
formula: (2 * x^0.6)%, where x = Research Points

name: Berserking
requirement: 200 Blood Frenzy (This R), Research Rampage (W135) & Retribution (D150)
effect: While Blood Frenzy is active, increase Mana Regeneration based on assistants owned. Also increases offline spell cast amount by 300% multiplicatively.
formula: +(3 * x^0.45), where x = assistants owned

name: Critical Strike
effect: Holy Light empowers Heaven's Domains based on Holy Light activity time this Reincarnation.
formula: (5 * x^0.65)%, where x = Holy Light activity time this Reincarnation

name: Swarming
effect: Gain assistants based on trophies unlocked. Also multiplicatively increase assistants by 10%.
formula: +(x^1.05), where x = trophies unlocked

name: Athletics
effect: Increase production of all other buildings by 200% per Olympian Hall built.
formula: ×200% per Olympian Hall built

name: Domination
effect: Increase FC find chance based on highest assistants in a single game (This R). Also increase FC chance by 50% multiplicatively.
formula: +(100 * x^0.5), where x = highest assistants this Reincarnation; also mult FC +100%

name: Entrench
effect: Increase production of Unique buildings based on excavations made.
formula: round(15 * x^0.8)%, where x = excavations made

name: Shattering
effect: Increase offline production based on Excavation depth.
formula: (10 * x^0.9)%, where x = Excavation depth

name: Heroism
effect: Increase clicking reward based on trophies unlocked.
formula: round(2.5 * x)%, where x = trophies unlocked

name: Survival
effect: Increase production of all other buildings based on Stonehenge Circles' production.
formula: (8 * (ln(1+x))^1.8)%, where x = Stonehenge Circles production

name: Siege
effect: Each building in the three highest tiers counts as 2 buildings for all purposes.

name: Ambush
requirement: Secrets of the Underworld as Drow
effect: Increase production of Spider Sanctuaries based on Offline Bonus.
formula: (3.5 * ln(1+x)^3.5)%, where x = offline production bonus multiplier

name: Stalking
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on Combo Strike activity time this Reincarnation.
formula: (x^0.6)%, where x = Combo Strike activity time this Reincarnation

name: Bloodlust
requirement: 1.5 hours as Evil (This R), Research Berserking (W205) & Focus (S460)
effect: While Blood Frenzy is active, increase production of all buildings based on Faction spells cast this Era.
formula: (15 * x^0.75)%, where x = Faction spells cast this Era

name: Resilience
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on clicks made this Era.
formula: (3.5 * x^0.35)%, where x = clicks this Era

name: Torture
requirement: 200 Drow Exchanges as Dromon, Research Soulrending (D245) & Stalking (W520)
effect: Increase assistant production based on total time spent as Evil (This R).
formula: (8 * x^0.8)%, where x = Evil time this Reincarnation

name: Authority
requirement: 2 hours Call to Arms activity time (This Game)
effect: Increase duration of all spells based on Call to Arms activity time this Reincarnation.
formula: (x^0.5)%, where x = Call to Arms activity time this Reincarnation

name: Scavenging
effect: Increase FC find chance based on assistants owned. Also multiplicatively increase FC chance by 160%.
formula: +(40 * x^0.4), where x = assistants owned; also mult FC +160%

name: Cataclysm
effect: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on clicks made this Era.
formula: (25 + 0.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = clicks this Era

name: Flanking
effect: Increase production of buildings one tier above or below Unique Buildings based on assistants owned.
formula: (2 * x^0.8)%, where x = assistants owned

name: Upheaval
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent as your least used alignment this Reincarnation. Highest bonus to lowest building tier.
formula: (0.5 * (60+x)^0.75 * (12-T)^2.15)%, where x = least used alignment time this R, T = building tier
